session_note: S27 batch shipped. P0 = Voltkin Phase 2C AI + attack (Standard-tier Council R1 + Battle Ledger 4 unanimous+1 compromise+1 2/3 + PRIME-AUDIT 7 deltas + CHECK Triumvirate 2 fixes+1 carry-forward). Bundle 459.48 -> 461.87 KB (+2.39 KB, 29.9% of +8 KB target; 38.13 KB headroom remaining). Tests 466 baseline -> 494 passing (+28 new) + 3 DOM-gated-skipped. Cumulative Phase 2: S25+S26+S27 = +6.77 KB of +25 KB cap. Council key resolutions: Q1 UNANIMOUS B extend SEVER_BOND.cause + applyCreatureAttack re-dispatches SEVER_BOND with cause=creature (Council overrules Claude default A inline; centralizes severance path post-cascade-DELETION), Q2 COMPROMISE Gemini-B over Grok-A VOLTKIN_ATTACK_FIRE_TICK=30 tunable constant, Q3 UNANIMOUS A every-tick re-selection, Q4 2/3 Grok+Claude A silent BOND_SEVERED creature audio S28 procedural zap carry-forward, Q5 UNANIMOUS creature-only synchronous GODLY_TRIGGER cascade 26-line DELETED, Q6 UNANIMOUS A main.ts post-CREATURE_TICK dispatch preserves CQS. CHECK Triumvirate 9 concerns: 2 ACCEPTED code changes (ARC_FLASH arcSeed multi-creature determinism + Delta4 boundary <= not <) + 6 REJECTED (Council-sanctioned Q1 B re-dispatch + Q9 cadence design + single-threaded JS no race) + 1 RALPH Delta8 carry-forward (1v1 client visual regression bonds vanish without visible creature/ARC_FLASH until S28 NetSnapshot v2 ships). Commit ea4b459 pushed origin/master af8a6d2..ea4b459. Real-context tokens at close: 338501 / 1000000 (33.85% GREEN). Zero regressions in 466 baseline tests; cinematic intro + voice line + cooldown unchanged; cascade DELETION fundamental UX shift (Phase-1 instant cascade -> S27 creature-driven 7-bonds-at-1/sec over 8s active window).

priorities.check_method: Standard-tier Council pipeline executed end-to-end: (1) A.0 STATE-DISCOVERY GATE verified 15 PDR claims against current repo state (world.ts:335-376 GODLY_TRIGGER cascade verified at offset; BOND_SEVERED.cause verified 'player'|'physics'|'godly' needs 'creature' extension; SEVER_BOND action.cause verified 'player'|'physics' only; Creature state union 'ATTACKING' confirmed S25-widened; Creature.targetPos confirmed S26 mutable; applyCreatureTick S25/S26 transitions confirmed; effects.ts 6 kinds no ARC_FLASH yet; effectsRenderer switch-dispatch confirmed; lifetime.ts per-kind registry confirmed; primitive.placerColor verified no placerPlayerId direct; canSeverBond physics-bypass pattern confirmed). 1 DELTA surfaced: blueprint test-surgery 5-8 removed + 12-15 added → revised to 0 removed + 15-18 added since godlyReducer.test.ts has 6 tests covering serialization/queue/abort/no-op but NONE assert cascade behavior. (2) Standard-tier batch PDR drafted 8-field template w/ 17 ACs + 21 explicit OOS items + 10 risks + Council deliberation plan + PDR GATE writeback plan + completion protocol + token budget projection. User approved with 'approved, go' (typo aoorived = approved). (3) PDR GATE fields written to session-state.json top-level + per-priority P0: pdr_approved=true + deliberation_completed=false initially + tier=Standard + unlock_source=user. (4) Council R1 parallel via grok_chat + gemini_chat MCP: Grok grok-4.20-0309-reasoning + Gemini gemini-2.5-pro on 6 questions w/ STRICT DECISION/RATIONALE/ALTERNATIVES-REJECTED/RISK/SKETCH per-question template. Clean first-pass for BOTH models (no Grok timeout this round, no hallucinations — every cited symbol verified against landed excerpts). (5) Battle Ledger synthesized: 4 UNANIMOUS (Q1 B extend SEVER_BOND.cause, Q3 A every-tick re-select, Q5 creature-only cascade DELETED, Q6 A main.ts post-tick dispatch) + 1 COMPROMISE Q2 Gemini-B over Grok-A VOLTKIN_ATTACK_FIRE_TICK=30 tunable for S28 retuning + 1 2/3 Q4 Grok+Claude A silent S27 audio over Gemini-B reuse player SFX (tonally wrong); deliberation_completed=true written. (6) PRIME-AUDIT 5-question adversarial pass yielded 7 deltas: Delta1 canSeverBond 'creature' bypass folded into 'physics' branch single-line (computeBaseCharge already returns 0 for non-'player'); Delta2 own-bonds fallback exercised in creatureAI.test.ts solo Q12 LOCKED; Delta3 multi-creature target conflict documented v1 limitation in applyCreatureAttack reducer comment (blueprint Q10); Delta4 wind-up abort transitions ATTACKING→SEEKING when target invalidates before/at FIRE_TICK (lt to lte boundary fixed post-CHECK); Delta5 cinematic-skip + cascade-DELETION cleaner UX documented in onCinematicHandoff comment; Delta6 S28 procedural Web Audio zap synth carry-forward (Gemini Q4 minority position preserved); Delta7 S28 ATTACKING animation wind-up frames carry-forward (Q2 B compromise spawned S28 work). (7) Implementation: 5 new files (creatureAI.ts ~110 LOC + creatureAttack.ts ~50 LOC + creatureAI.test.ts ~210 LOC w/ 10 tests + creatureAttack.test.ts ~150 LOC w/ 7 tests + arcFlash.ts ~120 LOC) + 11 edited (effects.ts BOND_SEVERED.cause+ARC_FLASH kind; world.ts SEVER_BOND.cause+CreatureAttackAction+dispatch case+GODLY_TRIGGER cascade 26-line DELETED; disruptionManager.ts canSeverBond 'creature' bypass; creature.ts targetBondId+4 constants; creatureLifecycle.ts applyCreatureTick S27 transitions w/ Delta4 wind-up abort; main.ts per-creature 3-step orchestration; lifetime.ts ARC_FLASH_DURATION_TICKS=18; effectsRenderer.ts case ARC_FLASH; creatureLifecycle.test.ts 7 new FSM tests; godlyReducer.test.ts 2 regression tests). (8) Gates: typecheck clean via npx tsc --noEmit; vitest run 494 passed + 3 DOM-gated-skipped via npx vitest run (466 baseline + 28 new — 10 creatureAI + 7 creatureAttack + 7 lifecycle FSM + 2 godlyReducer regression + 2 misc); vite build 461.87 KB main bundle via npm run build (delta +2.39 KB vs 459.48 baseline, 29.9% of +8 KB target). (9) CHECK Triumvirate: RALPH:PATROL self-audit + GROK-ANALYST + GEMINI-AUDITOR via grok_chat + gemini_chat. 9 concerns: 2 ACCEPTED + 6 REJECTED + 1 RALPH carry-forward. ACCEPTED: Grok C4 + Gemini G5 (UNANIMOUS cross-Council) ARC_FLASH pseudoRand seed must include start coords for multi-creature same-tick determinism — fixed via arcSeed helper folding tick + sx + sy via XOR; Gemini G3 Delta4 boundary off-by-one — changed `<` to `<=` so abort fires at exact ticksInState===FIRE_TICK=30 when bond gone (avoiding benign no-op CREATURE_ATTACK dispatch with no ARC_FLASH visual). REJECTED: Grok C1 (cadenceElapsed boundary — intentional Q9 cadence preservation), Grok C2 + Gemini G1 (reducer re-dispatch — Council Q1 B UNANIMOUS sanctioned, per S26 reflexion same-model R1 deeper deliberation wins over CHECK relitigation), Grok C3 (gameMode auth gap — host-only mint upstream + creature-only emit sufficient), Gemini G2 (post-FIRE_TICK no reset — Q9 cadence preserved by design), Gemini G4 (SEEKING targetBondId race — single-threaded JS, zero race window between findNearestBondTarget + world.bonds.get). RALPH Delta8 1v1 client visual regression: bonds gradually disappear without visible creature OR ARC_FLASH until S28 NetSnapshot v2 ships — explicit carry-forward, not blocking S27 since 1v1 net is already host-gated per S25 PRIME-AUDIT Delta1 + brother retest is 7-session manual carry. (10) Re-gates post-CHECK fixes: typecheck clean; vitest 494 passing (no regression — existing Delta4 boundary test holds under `<=` semantics since the test uses ticksInState=10 < 30 which evaluates < AND <=); vite build 461.87 KB (+0.10 KB from arcSeed helper). (11) Browser boot smoke via preview_start at port 15842: page loaded at ?debug=1, 0 console errors, world.creatures Map initialized (size=0), world.effects accepts ARC_FLASH push without throwing (renderer dispatch path verified), nextCreatureId=0, gameState='TITLE', cinematicActive=null. Full SQ4-TR4 trigger gameplay smoke (AC11) deferred to user manual playthrough — user vision delivery: cinematic intact → static structure → 60-tick SPAWNING → SEEKING drift toward nearest enemy bond → 60-tick ATTACKING per bond with ARC_FLASH at tick 30 + bond severs + structure clears bond-by-bond over ~7 attacks/8 seconds → DESPAWNING fade. (12) Committed ea4b459 + pushed origin/master af8a6d2..ea4b459. Real-context tokens at close: 338501 / 1000000 (33.85% GREEN — well under 500K YELLOW threshold). Bundle headroom remaining: 38.13 KB for S28 (spritesheet ~14 KB + AnimationController + NetSnapshot v2 + polish ~4 KB code). Zero regressions in 466 baseline tests; zero behavior change to Phase 1 cinematic playback or voice line; additive AI + attack + visual feedback infrastructure with surgical cascade DELETION migration.
